name: Monika Hicks, LCSW
title: Licensed Clinical Social Worker and Mental Health Consultant
bio: I am a purpose-driven mental health consultant who empowers others to heal beyond survival, break generational cycles, and intentionally choose healthier, more fulfilling ways of living. Monika Hicks is a therapist and mental health consultant who supports individuals, groups, and organizations through virtual care, emotional wellness education, and in-person trainings.
